module:
Tests for validating subsystem independence and reusability.

These tests verify that the core semantic subsystems can work independently
of the git-commit-viewer specific code, making them suitable for packaging
as a reusable Django module.

test_subsystem_imports_without_app_depen.docstring: Test that subsystems can be imported without app-specific dependencies.

test_registry_initialization_without_app.docstring: Test that registries initialize without app-specific code.

test_standalone_linguistic_processing.docstring: Test linguistic processing functions without app dependencies.

test_standalone_chunking.docstring: Test chunking functions without app dependencies.

test_standalone_tagging.docstring: Test tagging functions without app dependencies.

test_standalone_embedding.docstring: Test embedding functions without app dependencies.

test_cross_system_integration_without_ap.docstring: Test integration between subsystems without app dependencies.
